sections.paragraph:
-

(1) the article, Arab. أَلُ, Heb. הַ·, ל being inserted [by a compensative Dagesh] in the next letter; see Lehrg. p. 197, and above, p. 213 .

(2) A particle of interrogation, Arab. هَلْ, whence is taken חֲ interrogative, which see. The full form is once found, Deu 32:6, according to the reading of the Nehardeenses, who thus divide הַל יְהֹוָה, which others join together הליהוה. If the former be correct, גָּמַל is joined with an accusative, as is often the case.
